title: Quantum Mechanical Keyboard
description: Hot-swappable linear switches mounted inside a solid CNC-milled aluminum case with customized high-density foam dampening layers.

title: Ultrawide IPS Monitor
description: A color-accurate 34-inch display boasting 99% sRGB coverage, built-in USB-C power delivery hubs, and a seamless 144Hz screen refresh rate.

title: Ergonomic Mesh Task Chair
description: Features dynamic lumbar support elements alongside 4D adjustable armrests and high-tensile breathable elastomeric mesh back structures.
